headline: Baxter Reshapes Portfolio With Kidney Spin Off And Margin Focus
summary: Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) is restructuring its business, including a spin-off of its kidney care unit. The company is realigning its portfolio to concentrate on higher margin medical products. These actions are intended to sharpen operational focus and reshape Baxter’s core business profile. Baxter sits at the intersection of hospital products, drug delivery and medical technologies, so any major reshuffle of its portfolio can affect how it competes across these categories. The...
